field_values.action_summary: Dorothy arrives back at the farm in Kansas and runs toward a shocked Aunt Em, leading to an emotional embrace where Dorothy explains her return from Oz with Toto.
field_values.emotional_beat: From exhaustion/anticipation to overwhelming relief and joy.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of kansas_farmstead landscape; Tracking shots following dorothy's run toward the house; Medium close-ups of aunt_em's reaction; Tight close-ups/Two-shot for the embrace
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: dorothy physical appearance: dirt and wear from travel vs. home attire
toto position and movement during the run and embrace
lighting transition from dreamlike Oz to grounded natural Kansas light
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH024_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the return to reality by transitioning from dreamlike Oz aesthetics to grounded, natural Kansas lighting. The sequence must capture the physical exhaustion of a weary traveler meeting the sudden emotional release of a family reunion within the vastness of the farmstead.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (weary traveler appearance, dirt/wear on clothing)
- aunt_em (shocked, then relieved)
- toto (mobile during run and embrace)

## Required Environments
- kansas_farmstead (wide landscape, farmhouse structure, porch/entrance area)

## Continuity Constraints
- dorothy: physical wear/dirt from travel vs home attire
- toto: position and movement during the run and embrace
- lighting: transition from dreamlike Oz to grounded natural Kansas light

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the farmstead (Wide landscape, running)
- BT002: The Shock of Recognition (Medium close-up reaction)
- BT003: The Reunion and Explanation (Tight embrace/Two-shot)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
